micro-blog

Markdown micro-blog API with a built-in URL shortener. Public endpoints:

Explore

  • /posts — published posts (JSON)
  • /categories — categories (JSON)
  • /tags — tags (JSON)
  • /docs — Swagger UI, interactive API docs
  • /openapi.json — OpenAPI spec (JSON)
  • /openapi.yaml — OpenAPI spec (YAML)

Parameterized

  • GET /posts/{slug} — read one post by slug
  • GET /p/{code} — read one post by hashid
  • GET /categories/{slug} — posts in a category
  • GET /tags/{slug} — posts with a tag
  • GET /s/{code} — resolve a short link

This is the embedded fallback page. For the hot-reloading dev UI, run the dev stack (docker compose up) and open http://localhost:5173. The full React app is served here once the production image is built (npm run build in web/, or docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up --build).
